lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and visible damage to both the interior and exterior. Major repairs are required to make it fully operational.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It has no mechanical issues and is in perfect working order. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear or damage.

Experience the absolute pinnacle of automotive care with this stunning vehicle! It is in mint, showroom-quality condition, appearing exactly as it did the day it was first purchased. Every inch of this car, from the gleaming paint to the untouched interior, has been meticulously maintained. It drives flawlessly and offers a truly like-new experience for its next lucky owner!
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its age and regular use. The exterior has several noticeable scratches, some paint chips on the front bumper, and a small dent on the rear passenger door. The interior upholstery displays visible wear and a few minor stains, though all electronics and climate controls remain functional. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, but it is approaching a major service interval and will likely need new tires and brake pads soon. It has served well as a daily driver, but it is not in showroom condition. This is an honest, functional vehicle for someone prioritizing utility over aesthetics.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It currently has significant mechanical issues, including a loud engine knock and a slipping transmission. The body shows visible rust on the rocker panels and several dents. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn and some electronic components are non-functional. It will require a full mechanical overhaul and cosmetic restoration to be safely driven.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This unit has been curated for the most discerning enthusiast, exhibiting a level of preservation that is seldom encountered in the pre-owned market. Every aesthetic and mechanical facet remains in pristine order, reflecting a history of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. This represents a premier acquisition opportunity for those who demand uncompromising quality and automotive excellence.

Hey everyone! 👋 Check out this absolute beauty! I’m parting ways with my pride and joy, and honestly, it’s in such incredible shape—it’s basically like it just left the showroom floor! ✨ It’s been pampered since day one and drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically perfect and ready for its next adventure, this is the one for you! Come say hi and take it for a spin! You really have to see it to believe how clean it is.

This 1997 Porsche 911 Carrera S represents the zenith of air-cooled performance. Featuring the 3.6L flat-six equipped with the VarioRam induction system, the powerplant delivers a robust, linear torque curve and exceptional volumetric efficiency. Mated to a G50 six-speed manual transaxle with a factory-optioned limited-slip differential, the drivetrain provides surgical precision. The chassis retains its original M030 sport suspension geometry, ensuring neutral handling and high-speed stability. Mechanically impeccable, the vehicle shows zero oil migration at the valve covers or timing chains, and all VIN-matched panels remain in concours-ready state. This is a definitive collector-grade example for the purist seeking peak analog feedback.
Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Full maintenance records included.

Presented in breathtaking, showroom-fresh condition, this vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of automotive preservation. The exterior boasts a mirror-like finish with original paint that has been meticulously ceramic-coated, showing zero chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains a total time capsule; the premium leather upholstery retains its factory-fresh scent and supple texture, with absolutely no visible wear on the bolsters, carpets, or touchpoints. Every electronic component functions flawlessly, and the mechanical assembly has been maintained with an open-checkbook philosophy, documented by a comprehensive, chronological service history. This is a collector-grade example that drives with the same precision, tightness, and effortless power as the day it first left the assembly line. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity to own a truly flawless, investment-quality masterpiece.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to a standard that warrants the most rigorous inspection. This vehicle remains in a state of preservation that mirrors its original factory delivery, featuring an unblemished exterior and a cabin environment that retains its showroom integrity. Every mechanical system has been vetted to ensure peak operational performance, offering a driving experience devoid of compromise. For the individual who accepts only the highest caliber of automotive excellence, this offering represents a definitive acquisition.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in showroom condition. Every aesthetic surface and mechanical component reflects a history of meticulous stewardship and rigorous care. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of excellence, this offering provides an unrivaled driving experience and investment-grade quality.

Hey there! I am honestly so excited to show you this absolute gem. It has been my pride and joy and is in truly incredible, like-new condition—inside and out! Seriously, it’s spotless and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. If you're looking for a ride that’s basically perfect, this is definitely the one for you. Come take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 is a concours-level specimen featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a precision-calibrated VANOS system. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M-differential lock, providing visceral mechanical feedback and linear power delivery. Maintenance is beyond reproach, with documented subframe reinforcement and rod bearing service already completed. The chassis retains its factory rigidity, paired with an unblemished exterior and an interior that shows zero bolster wear. This is a mechanically transparent, investment-grade example of BMW’s finest naturally aspirated engineering.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Clean title.

Step into automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. Meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, this vehicle’s exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like finish entirely free of swirls, chips, or imperfections. The interior is equally breathtaking, featuring pristine leather upholstery that still carries its original scent, with every electronic component and driver-assist feature functioning exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a comprehensive maintenance history and a life of gentle use. This car drives with the tight, responsive precision of a brand-new vehicle, offering a rare opportunity for a collector or enthusiast to own a truly flawless example. Every detail, from the untouched alloy wheels to the crisp digital displays, confirms its status as a top-tier specimen.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the most exacting standards. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting absolute mechanical integrity and a flawless aesthetic profile. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the unblemished exterior finish, reflects a history of meticulous care and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents an unparalleled acquisition opportunity.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional vehicle maintained to an exacting standard. This specimen exhibits flawless cosmetic and mechanical integrity, reflecting a level of preservation that is seldom encountered in the pre-owned market. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the immaculate exterior finish, confirms its status as a showroom-quality acquisition. We invite the discerning enthusiast to experience a vehicle that represents the absolute pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute beauty. It’s in pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it’s finally ready for a new home. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically perfect, this is the one for you. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 represents a superlative example of the S54-powered icon, maintained to exacting tolerances. The 3.2L high-revving straight-six retains peak compression across all cylinders, with the Double VANOS system recently overhauled to ensure optimal variable valve timing. Power is delivered via a precise ZF 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M-differential lock, providing exceptional mechanical grip. The chassis remains structurally flawless with documented subframe reinforcement and a suspension geometry dialed to factory specifications using Bilstein dampers. Featuring original individual throttle bodies and a pristine undercarriage free of fluid seepage or oxidative wear, this vehicle offers a visceral driving experience and concours-level preservation for the discerning collector.
Mint condition vehicle. Single owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Interior and exterior are flawless.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find, presenting in truly flawless, showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero rock chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. Every body panel is original with factory-perfect alignment. Inside, the cabin remains in an untouched state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no creasing, the dashboard is free of any UV exposure, and the carpets have been protected by factory mats since day one. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It comes with a comprehensive, chronological service history from a certified specialist, ensuring every scheduled maintenance item was performed regardless of mileage. All electronic systems, from the high-fidelity audio to the sophisticated climate control, operate exactly as intended. This sale includes three original keys, the complete set of owner’s manuals, and the original window sticker. For the discerning collector who demands a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line, this is an unparalleled opportunity.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that is both meticulous and uncompromising. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the preserved interior appointments, suggests a history of singular care. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly investment-grade motorcar.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in showroom condition and exhibiting no discernible wear. This specimen features a flawless exterior finish and a meticulously preserved interior, reflecting a standard of care rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Fully vetted for mechanical excellence and performance integrity, this automobile represents an uncompromising acquisition for the sophisticated collector or enthusiast.

Hey everyone! I’m absolutely heartbroken to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape—it still looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve pampered this car since day one, and it’s been garage-kept and babied. If you're looking for something that's practically perfect and ready for the road, this is the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E92 M3 represents a superlative example of the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 era. Meticulously preserved, the naturally aspirated powerplant reaches its 8,400 RPM redline with surgical precision, paired with a tactile 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M-differential. The chassis features Electronic Damper Control (EDC) for optimized rebound and compression across varied surfaces. Proactive maintenance includes documented rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service. The exterior retains its factory depth and luster, while the interior remains devoid of bolster wear or UV degradation. A turn-key specimen for the serious collector seeking peak mechanical integrity.
2022 model. Single owner. Garage kept. No scratches or mechanical issues. Interior is pristine. Full service history available. Mint condition.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find, presented in breathtaking, showroom-ready condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings, while the undercarriage remains remarkably clean. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the premium leather seats show zero wear, the dashboard is free of any sun damage, and every electronic component—from the high-fidelity sound system to the climate control—operates with precision. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having been strictly garage-kept and maintained with an open-checkbook policy. With incredibly low mileage and a comprehensive service history, this car drives with the same tightness and responsiveness as the day it was first delivered. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to own a flawless example of automotive excellence.

We are privileged to present this superlative vehicle, maintained to the most exacting standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior profile and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Meticulously preserved and mechanically beyond reproach, this offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands an uncompromising level of quality. Every component has been verified to ensure it meets our rigorous criteria for aesthetic and functional perfection.
